title: Verify Engagement Content Logic
description: Tests the logic for the 'Engagement' section, ensuring it shows in-progress content correctly and suggests new content post-completion.
preconditions: Two users (C and D) are in the Trial Corner cohort.

steps.description: 1. User C: Watch 50% of a movie titled 'Action Hero'.
2. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub and check the 'Engagement' section.
3. Verify 'Action Hero' is displayed with an option to 'Resume Consuming'.
4. User D: Watch 95% of a movie titled 'Comedy Gold'.
5. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub and check the 'Engagement' section.
6. Verify the section now shows the top-rated content in the 'Comedy' genre, not 'Comedy Gold'.

expected_result: The Engagement section correctly displays content with <90% consumption for resuming and suggests new, relevant content once consumption is >90%.
